title: mentha farinosa
intro: Mentha farinosa, also known as corn mint or bee balm, is a perennial herb native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mentha farinosa include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to soothe headaches and skin irritations. Mentha farinosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
